name: Healthcare
copTitle: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (Health) 2022
sectorLegislation: Private Healthcare Facilities and Services Act 1998

security.encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.2+ in transit for EHR
deltaFromBaseline: AES-256 mandatory for EHR data at rest
TLS 1.2+ mandatory for all data in transit
2FA required for EHR access
Auto-logout after 10 minutes of inactivity
Break-glass emergency access with automatic privacy officer alert
Extended retention for minors (until age 25)
25-year retention for obstetric records
10-year surgical record retention
Disposal certificates mandatory

sensitiveData.specialCategories: All patient data is sensitive by definition
sensitiveData.protectionLevel: Explicit consent per processing purpose; ethics committee for research
deltaFromBaseline: All patient data classified as sensitive regardless of content
Ethics committee approval prerequisite for research use
Research consent specific per project

disclosure.consentRequirements: Specific consent per insurer disclosure; referral consent
deltaFromBaseline: Specific consent required for each insurance disclosure
Referral to treating providers requires documented consent
Doctor-patient confidentiality overlays PDPA requirements

consent.separateConsents: Separate for treatment, billing, insurance, research
consent.emergencyProvisions: Vital interests exception for emergency treatment; documented post-hoc
deltaFromBaseline: Four separate consent categories: treatment, billing, insurance, research
Emergency vital interests exception with post-hoc documentation
Research consent requires ethics committee approval

crossBorder.mechanisms: s129A-compliant transfer mechanisms; telehealth platform assessment
deltaFromBaseline: Overseas telehealth providers must demonstrate s129A compliance
International referral transfers require documented mechanism

accessRights.accessProcess: Patients may request copy of medical records
accessRights.clinicalCorrection: Clinical notes: addendum model (no deletion of clinical observations)
deltaFromBaseline: Medical record copying fee restricted to reasonable amount
Clinical notes use addendum correction model
No deletion of original clinical observations

provisions.title: Electronic Health Records
provisions.summary: AES-256 encryption, 2FA access, break-glass emergency procedures

provisions.title: Telehealth & Digital Health
provisions.summary: Encrypted platforms, DPIA required, s129A for overseas providers

provisions.title: Medical Research
provisions.summary: Ethics committee approval; separate consent per research project
